parameters.name: wavetype
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: The shape of the waveform to repeat, unless overridden by the Source Wave:

parameters.name: play
parameters.label: Play
parameters.description: The LFO oscillates when 1, and stops when 0. Think of it like play and pause.

parameters.name: frequency
parameters.label: Frequency
parameters.description: The cycles per second of the oscillation. When the Octave Control input is connected, it alters the frequency exponentially.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.label: Offset
parameters.description: Values output from the can have an offset added to them.

parameters.name: amp
parameters.label: Amplitude
parameters.description: Values output from the can be scaled.

parameters.name: bias
parameters.label: Bias
parameters.description: Shape control for Triangle, Gaussian and Square waves. For triangle waves, it moves the peak. For square waves, it alters the width of the peak. Zero means no bias.

parameters.name: phase
parameters.label: Phase
parameters.description: A value of .5 is a phase shift of 180 degrees, or one half cycle.

parameters.name: resetcondition
parameters.label: Reset Condition
parameters.description: This menu determines how the Reset input triggers resetting the channel(s).

parameters.name: reset
parameters.label: Reset
parameters.description: This toggle resets the channel(s) to 0 while On.

parameters.name: resetpulse
parameters.label: Reset Pulse
parameters.description: This button instantly resets the channel(s) to 0.

parameters.name: channelname
parameters.label: Channel Name
parameters.description: A list of the names of the channels. You can put patterns like to generate 10 channels. See .

parameters.name: rate
parameters.label: Sample Rate
parameters.description: The sample rate of the . The default sample rate is 60 samples per second.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
